Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players always have access to the latest features and fixes in the game.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString

Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances readability and clarity of time-related information for players.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString

Changed_Other.purpose: Improves loading times by optimizing how version information is handled.
